use_cases: Displaying feature highlights in a structured card layout for product pages
Organizing pricing or plan information with consistent card components
Creating reusable card-based content sections across enterprise applications
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style Card component system providing reusable Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, and CardFooter primitives. This atomic component system serves as the foundation for building feature grids and content displays in enterprise-grade applications. Used as the building block for feature-grid-enterprise-grade layout components.
